author: @StefanDanov
text: Robert, I have a specific question and I don't find a satisfying answer. Let's say I have a motor and a generator on the same shaft. At some lower speed, if I short the generator the system slows down, if I short it at some higher speed the system speeds up and the motor begins to consume less. Why does it happen and is there a situation where this effect becomes useful?
